purpose: Keep cmd/gofly command flags, configuration defaults, global output controls, usage errors, and JSON contract evidence aligned without changing existing CLI semantics.

configurationSurfaces.mutationPolicy: init, set, and clean must expose dry-run or plan evidence before filesystem mutation
configurationSurfaces.jsonPolicy: config commands remain text/plan commands until explicit JSON contracts are added and golden-tested

configurationSurfaces.contract: global JSON errors emit exactly one envelope to stdout and leave stderr empty
invalid commands, invalid flags, missing flag values, and config usage mistakes classify as errUsage
stable JSON-capable commands are governed by docs/reference/cli-json-contract-goldens.json and TestCLIJSONContractGoldens

coverage.riskBlocked: config init silently losing default profile features
config show/get drifting from saved configuration
config set not persisting readable values
config clean leaving stale configuration behind
config usage mistakes returning runtime failure semantics
global output mode corrupting stdout/stderr automation contracts
JSON-capable commands drifting from stable envelopes

knownDrift.reason: The config command currently has no stable JSON contract. Do not add --json implicitly; add a golden contract first if product requirements change.

aiflowExecution.blocker: aiflow CLI currently fails to compile in the adjacent aiflow checkout because harness/policy.go imports fmt without use
aiflowExecution.goflyImpact: none; the local governance gate is self-contained
